understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each KA59 level by positioning every selectable piece so that all goal tiles marked '+' were occupied at the same time, thereby triggering a WIN for the level and ultimately finishing the whole game after all levels were cleared within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement consisted of MOVE_* actions that shifted the currently selected piece one grid step unless blocked by walls/obstacles, with pushing only possible when the adjacent cell contained a movable object and the cell beyond it was empty (otherwise no movement occurred). CLICK actions were used to select/switch which selectable piece was active by targeting its coordinates, and some CLICK targets could also act like interaction/teleport points for the selected piece if the rules allowed; when the destination was blocked or the click had no valid movement effect, the piece did not change position.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each KA59 level by positioning every selectable piece so that all goal tiles marked '+' were occupied at the same time, thereby triggering a WIN for the level and ultimately finishing the whole game after all levels were cleared within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement consisted of MOVE_* actions that shifted the currently selected piece one grid step unless blocked by walls/obstacles, with pushing only possible when the adjacent cell contained a movable object and the cell beyond it was empty (otherwise no movement occurred). CLICK actions were used to select/switch which selectable piece was active by targeting its coordinates, and some CLICK targets could also act like interaction/teleport points for the selected piece if the rules allowed; when the destination was blocked or the click had no valid movement effect, the piece did not change position.
